title: The Jenkins Approach to Time Series Modeling
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative, three-stage 'Box-Jenkins Methodology' for building ARIMA models, pioneered by Gwilym M. Jenkins with George Box.
relationships: Starts with Model Identification, which feeds into Model Estimation
Model Estimation is followed by Model Diagnostics
If Diagnostics are unsatisfactory, the process loops back to Iterate/Re-identify
If Diagnostics are satisfactory, the process ends at a Satisfactory Model
